code: private Map<String,Object> buildContent(JsonObject jsonObject){ Map<String,Object> content=new HashMap<>(); content.put("msg_type",jsonObject.get("msg_type").getAsString()); if (jsonObject.get("ats") != null) { String ats=jsonObject.get("ats").getAsString(); String text=jsonObject.get("content").getAsJsonObject().get("text").getAsString(); List<String> collect=Arrays.stream(ats.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList()); for ( String userId : collect) { text+="<at user_id=\"" + userId + "\"></at>"; } jsonObject.get("content").getAsJsonObject().addProperty("text",text); } content.put("content",jsonObject.get("content").getAsJsonObject()); return content; }
summary: put the "content" from the  jsonobject to the content.

code: @Override public void write(final byte b[],final int off,final int len) throws IOException { if (off < 0 || off > b.length || len < 0 || off + len > b.length || off + len < 0) { throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(); } else if (len == 0) { return; } if (this.count + len > this.buf.length) { this.encodePendingBytes(false); } System.arraycopy(b,off,this.buf,this.count,len); this.count+=len; }
summary: write bytes of length len from a byte array.

code: private Pair<List<Integer>,Long> computeSuffixSum(List<Integer> bounds){ List<Integer> suffixSum=new ArrayList<>(Collections.nCopies(bounds.size(),0)); long sum=0; for (int i=bounds.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) { suffixSum.set(i,(int)Math.min(Integer.MAX_VALUE,sum)); sum+=bounds.get(i); } return Pair.of(suffixSum,sum); }
summary: return a pair of the list of suffix sum and the sum of all elements of bounds.

code: public static <V,E>IsomorphicGraphMapping<V,E> identity(Graph<V,E> graph){ Map<V,V> fMap=CollectionUtil.newHashMapWithExpectedSize(graph.vertexSet().size()); Map<V,V> bMap=CollectionUtil.newHashMapWithExpectedSize(graph.vertexSet().size()); for ( V v : graph.vertexSet()) { fMap.put(v,v); bMap.put(v,v); } return new IsomorphicGraphMapping<>(fMap,bMap,graph,graph); }
summary: compute and return an identity automorphism for the given graph.

code: private static char decodeHexNibble(final char c){ if ('0' <= c && c <= '9') { return (char)(c - '0'); } else if ('a' <= c && c <= 'f') { return (char)(c - 'a' + 10); } else if ('A' <= c && c <= 'F') { return (char)(c - 'A' + 10); } else { return Character.MAX_VALUE; } }
summary: convert a hexadecimal number to binary and return its character type.

code: private static boolean startsWith(final String str,final String prefix,final boolean ignoreCase){ if (str == null || prefix == null) { return str == null && prefix == null; } if (prefix.length() > str.length()) { return false; } return str.regionMatches(ignoreCase,0,prefix,0,prefix.length()); }
summary: return true if the given string has the specified prefix with optional cases which can be ignored, or both string and prefix are null.otherwise return false.

code: static long compressTimeBucket(long timeBucket,int dayStep){ if (dayStep > 1) { DateTime time=TIME_BUCKET_FORMATTER.parseDateTime("" + timeBucket); int days=Days.daysBetween(DAY_ONE,time).getDays(); int groupBucketOffset=days % dayStep; return Long.parseLong(time.minusDays(groupBucketOffset).toString(TIME_BUCKET_FORMATTER)); } else { return timeBucket; } }
summary: follow the daystep to reformat the time bucket with time_bucket_formatter.

code: public synchronized void send(final String message){ Iterator ce=connections.iterator(); for (Iterator e=writers.iterator(); e.hasNext(); ) { ce.next(); PrintWriter writer=(PrintWriter)e.next(); writer.print(message); if (writer.checkError()) { ce.remove(); e.remove(); } } }
summary: send a message to each of the connections in telnet-friendly output.
